title: Specklinia peroupavae
taxonomy: Specklinia peroupavae belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This family consists of approximately 30,000 species of orchids, which are widely distributed across the world. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Specklinia peroupavae further falls under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Maxillarieae. Specklinia peroupavae is also classified as a species of the genus Specklinia. The classification of Specklinia peroupavae is a way to understand its evolutionary relationships and position within the plant kingdom.
